hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "작업 완료!" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' 2>/dev/null; echo '[Stop] tasks/todo.md 업데이트 확인'
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd /Users/shinjeayoun/dreaming-mech && npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/shinjeayoun/dreaming-mech/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5; cd /Users/shinjeayoun/dreaming-mech/backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
